The hidden engineering work behind turning AI-generated code into secure, scalable, production-ready software
Artificial intelligence has changed the way developers build software.
A few years ago, creating a new feature in Laravel meant reading documentation, designing database tables, writing migrations, creating models and controllers, defining API routes, adding validation, testing edge cases, and debugging every issue manually.
Today, a developer can open an AI coding assistant and write:
“Create a Laravel API for project management with authentication, role-based permissions, tasks, comments, notifications, and activity logs.”
Within minutes, AI may generate:

• Database migrations

• Eloquent models

• Controllers

• API routes

• Form requests

• Authentication logic

• Policies

• Tests

• Documentation
The result can look impressive.
